diff --git a/clone b/clone
deleted file mode 100755
index a22a466..0000000
--- a/clone
+++ /dev/null
@@ -1,17 +0,0 @@
-#!/usr/bin/env bash
-
-gh repo list gnostr-org --limit 1000 | while read -r repo _; do
-  RESULT="${repo//gnostr-org/public}"
-  echo "cloning $repo into $RESULT"
-  gh repo clone "$repo" "$RESULT" -- -q 2>/dev/null || (
-    echo "updating $RESULT"
-    cd "$RESULT"
-    # Handle case where local checkout is on a non-main/master branch
-    # - ignore checkout errors because some repos may have zero commits,
-    # so no main or master
-    git checkout -q main   2>/dev/null || true
-    git checkout -q master 2>/dev/null || true
-    git checkout -q readme 2>/dev/null || true
-    git pull -q
-  )
-done
